title: rubus regillus
intro: Rubus regillus, also known as the thimbleberry, is a type of perennial shrub that belongs to the rose family and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus regillus lie in its rich content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus regillus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus regillus can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its sweet and tangy flavor.
